task_docs.sid-a6a0a0abeada44e1b42c176d9e2d:
[BA]
Description: The customer identifies a need for process management tooling and researches available solutions on the market.
Purpose:     Establish awareness and shortlist SAP Signavio as a candidate solution.
Inputs:      Internal process challenges, analyst reports, peer recommendations.
Outputs:     Shortlist of process management vendors including SAP Signavio.
Responsible: Customer / Prospect
Systems:     (none identified from model labels)
Risks:       Customer may not identify the correct solution category; (inferred) analyst bias toward competitors.
task_docs.sid-86dd197362324d87b253e4776b1e:
[BA]
Description: The customer activates a Signavio trial, explores core features independently, and attends SAP-hosted onboarding workshops.
Purpose:     Allow hands-on evaluation of Signavio Process Manager to build confidence and validate fit.
Inputs:      Provisioned trial environment, workshop invitations.
Outputs:     Customer evaluation outcome (fit / no-fit decision), workshop participation records.
Responsible: Customer / Prospect
Systems:     SAP Signavio Process Manager (inferred from context)
Risks:       Low engagement with trial leads to unconverted prospects; workshop no-shows.
task_docs.sid-cbd3c119a7a84b2ebdd085ccf0fc:
[BA]
Description: The customer reviews the commercial proposal from Sales and formally signs the contract to proceed with a production license.
Purpose:     Converts the evaluated prospect into a paying customer and establishes contractual commitment.
Inputs:      Custom proposal, legal review, signature authority.
Outputs:     Signed contract, purchase order.
Responsible: Customer / Prospect
Systems:     (none identified from model labels)
Risks:       Negotiation delays; budget approvals causing stalled deals; (inferred) legal review extending timelines.
task_docs.sid-9511208b9bda42409fe272c085e8:
[BA]
Description: The customer's process analysts begin modeling their enterprise process landscape within SAP Signavio Process Manager.
Purpose:     Realize core product value by populating the process library with real organizational processes.
Inputs:      Process documentation, interviews, enablement training completed.
Outputs:     Initial set of BPMN process models, published to the Collaboration Hub.
Responsible: Customer / Prospect
Systems:     SAP Signavio Process Manager (inferred from context)
Risks:       Low model quality without governance standards; (inferred) shadow processes not captured.
task_docs.sid-b359be19ef964672a0cfaf2c9622:
[BA]
Description: Sales qualifies an inbound lead from a prospect who has expressed interest in SAP Signavio.
Purpose:     Determine whether the prospect meets criteria for a structured sales engagement.
Inputs:      Inbound inquiry, lead data, ICP criteria.
Outputs:     Qualified opportunity record; go/no-go for discovery engagement.
Responsible: Sales & Pre-Sales
Systems:     (none identified from model labels)
Risks:       Misqualification leads to wasted resources; (inferred) poor data quality on inbound leads.
task_docs.sid-9a3d54009af64a9b8536a0a5669c:
[BA]
Description: Sales conducts a tailored product demonstration and proof-of-concept session aligned to the customer's specific processes.
Purpose:     Showcase SAP Signavio's value in the context of the prospect's use cases and industry.
Inputs:      Customer context from discovery call, demo environment, POC scenarios.
Outputs:     Demo feedback, POC results, next-step agreement.
Responsible: Sales & Pre-Sales
Systems:     SAP Signavio Process Manager (inferred from context)
Risks:       Generic demo fails to resonate; (inferred) technical gaps identified during POC.
task_docs.sid-e9e0bf0da8244541b98fc1fb2480:
[BA]
Description: Sales builds and delivers a customized commercial proposal covering licensing, professional services, and success plan.
Purpose:     Provide the customer with a clear and tailored offer to move forward with a purchase.
Inputs:      POC results, pricing guidelines, customer requirements, procurement process.
Outputs:     Commercial proposal document sent to customer.
Responsible: Sales & Pre-Sales
Systems:     (none identified from model labels)
Risks:       Proposal mismatch with customer budget; (inferred) delayed response from procurement.
task_docs.sid-a2e3adca2da244ba8610e7050e4d:
[BA]
Description: Sales identifies expansion opportunities and presents additional module licenses to grow the customer's Signavio footprint.
Purpose:     Increase customer lifetime value and deepen Signavio adoption across additional use cases.
Inputs:      QBR outcomes, adoption metrics, identified process gaps.
Outputs:     Expansion order, updated contract.
Responsible: Sales & Pre-Sales
Systems:     (none identified from model labels)
Risks:       Expansion pushed prematurely before customer sees value from initial license.
task_docs.sid-8d60cf774675481eb94b045aa93b:
[BA]
Description: The Signavio platform automatically provisions a trial environment for the qualified prospect.
Purpose:     Enable frictionless self-service evaluation without manual setup delays.
Inputs:      Trial request from qualified prospect, provisioning trigger.
Outputs:     Active trial tenant with sample content and login credentials.
Responsible: Signavio Platform
Systems:     SAP Signavio Process Manager
Risks:       Provisioning failures or delays degrade first impressions; email deliverability issues.
task_docs.sid-5b5351a76ae24a1588abf393b58f:
[BA]
Description: The Signavio platform provisions a production-grade tenant following contract signature.
Purpose:     Create the customer's permanent workspace with agreed configuration and user licenses.
Inputs:      Signed contract, configuration parameters, user list.
Outputs:     Production tenant with correct entitlements and admin access.
Responsible: Signavio Platform
Systems:     SAP Signavio Process Manager
Risks:       Misconfigured tenant causes onboarding delays; (inferred) SSO integration failures.
task_docs.sid-5f220bdea1e1410c89eb85595485:
[BA]
Description: The platform triggers a sequence of automated onboarding emails to guide new admins and users through initial setup steps.
Purpose:     Accelerate time-to-value by proactively guiding customers through key first actions.
Inputs:      Provisioned production tenant, user profile data.
Outputs:     Delivered email sequences with activation links, resource guides, and next-step calls-to-action.
Responsible: Signavio Platform
Systems:     SAP Signavio Process Manager
Risks:       Emails filtered as spam; (inferred) generic messaging misaligned to customer segment.
task_docs.sid-0a94f2c787c245519d487db669b8:
[BA]
Description: Customer Success runs a structured kickoff meeting with key stakeholders to align on goals, success criteria, and onboarding plan.
Purpose:     Establish a shared understanding of objectives and ownership to ensure a successful deployment.
Inputs:      Signed contract, stakeholder list, success plan template.
Outputs:     Agreed success plan, kickoff meeting notes, assigned action items.
Responsible: Customer Success
Systems:     (none identified from model labels)
Risks:       Key stakeholders absent; (inferred) misaligned expectations on scope and timeline.
task_docs.sid-73cbee3b64dc4b87ba563e6dee4e:
[BA]
Description: Customer Success delivers structured training sessions covering admin capabilities, modeling standards, and collaboration features.
Purpose:     Equip the customer's team with the skills to independently use and govern Signavio.
Inputs:      Kickoff outcomes, training curriculum, attendee list.
Outputs:     Trained admin and user cohort, training completion records.
Responsible: Customer Success
Systems:     SAP Signavio Process Manager (inferred from context)
Risks:       Low attendance reduces self-sufficiency; (inferred) knowledge gaps leading to poor model quality.
task_docs.sid-b0015b6d80d94bc4ab22d5291e0a:
[BA]
Description: Customer Success conducts a Quarterly Business Review to assess adoption metrics, value realization, and future roadmap alignment.
Purpose:     Ensure ongoing customer health, surface risks early, and identify growth opportunities.
Inputs:      Adoption metrics, success plan progress, customer feedback.
Outputs:     QBR deck, updated success plan, expansion leads for Sales.
Responsible: Customer Success
Systems:     (none identified from model labels)
Risks:       Declining engagement metrics signal churn risk; (inferred) misalignment on ROI expectations.

lane_summaries.sid-054475a78b3740fd8f1f6cd120a8:
[BA] CUSTOMER / PROSPECT
══════════════════════════════
 Tasks    4 (Research process management solutions to Build enterprise process library)
 Systems  SAP Signavio Process Manager (inferred)
 Output   Signed contract, active process library
 Role     Evaluates, purchases, and adopts the product
══════════════════════════════
The customer drives the core journey from first awareness through to active adoption. Their decisions at each stage — evaluate, purchase, and build — determine the velocity of the entire engagement.
lane_summaries.sid-2b42258791ec44ccb62ba6961a26:
[BA] SALES & PRE-SALES
══════════════════════════════
 Tasks    4 (Qualify inbound lead to Upsell additional licenses & modules)
 Systems  (none identified from model labels)
 Output   Signed contract, expansion orders
 Role     Qualifies prospects, demonstrates value, closes and expands deals
══════════════════════════════
Sales guides the prospect from initial qualification through contract signature and ongoing expansion. Quality of demo and proposal directly impacts conversion rates and deal velocity.
lane_summaries.sid-455726e7c3f84f4cb59763565249:
[BA] SIGNAVIO PLATFORM
══════════════════════════════
 Tasks    3 (Provision trial environment to Send automated onboarding emails)
 Systems  SAP Signavio Process Manager
 Output   Active trial and production tenants, automated onboarding sequences
 Role     Automated infrastructure provisioning and onboarding enablement
══════════════════════════════
The platform automates the critical setup steps that would otherwise create manual bottlenecks. Fast, error-free provisioning and timely onboarding emails are key drivers of early engagement.
lane_summaries.sid-d648e7e88b4e45958e3826394c0f:
[BA] CUSTOMER SUCCESS
══════════════════════════════
 Tasks    3 (Run project kickoff meeting to Conduct quarterly business review)
 Systems  SAP Signavio Process Manager (inferred)
 Output   Trained users, validated success plan, QBR insights
 Role     Orchestrates onboarding, enables users, and monitors long-term health
══════════════════════════════
Customer Success is the human layer that converts a provisioned tenant into realized value. Their touchpoints — kickoff, training, and QBR — are the strongest predictors of retention and expansion.

gateway_texts.sid-2382b60d46c74a5c9abf1b83c913: [BA] Evaluates whether the customer has accepted the commercial proposal. Yes -> Review & sign contract; No -> (inferred) return to Sales for proposal revision.

impact_analysis:
[BA] IMPACT ANALYSIS  *  SAP Signavio Customer Journey
==================================================================
 IT System                   Affected Tasks                  Risk
------------------------------------------------------------------
 SAP Signavio Process Manager Provision trial environment,   HIGH
                              Provision production tenant,
                              Send automated onboarding emails,
                              Explore trial & attend workshops,
                              Build enterprise process library
------------------------------------------------------------------
 ROLE / DEPT               OWNS                            TASKS
------------------------------------------------------------------
 Customer / Prospect       Evaluation & adoption               4
 Sales & Pre-Sales         Pipeline & revenue growth           4
 Signavio Platform         Infrastructure & automation         3
 Customer Success          Onboarding & retention              3
==================================================================
 RISK STATEMENT
 HIGH  Platform provisioning failure delays trial/onboard; first impression severely impacted.
 MED   Low trial engagement or poor demo quality leads to unconverted evaluation.
 LOW   QBR identifies adoption gaps late; expansion opportunities missed.
==================================================================
